scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/assets build && bun run --cwd packages/types build && bun run --cwd packages/schemas build && bun run --cwd packages/utils build
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun run --cwd packages/assets typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/types typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/schemas typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/utils typecheck
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:packages && bun run typecheck:packages && bun run --cwd apps/mobile typecheck
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run lint:mobile && bun run lint:architecture && bun run typecheck && bun run test
